name: Cat Spraying No More
summary: A focused digital guide explaining why cats spray outside the litter box and how to stop and prevent marking with behavioral and environmental fixes.
best_for: cat owners dealing with spraying, marking, or urinating outside the litter box
keywords: stop cat peeing outside litter box

name: Ideas 4 Landscaping
summary: A digital landscaping resource with design ideas, layouts, and planning guidance for homeowners who want to improve curb appeal and outdoor spaces.
best_for: homeowners planning a yard makeover who want structured landscaping ideas rather than random Pinterest pins

name: Parrot Secrets
summary: A comprehensive parrot training ebook covering biting, trick training, speech, diet, and care — aimed at owners of companion parrots and cockatiels.
best_for: parrot owners who need practical training help for biting, screaming, or bonding

name: Build A Container Home
summary: A digital guide to designing and building a home from shipping containers, covering planning, insulation, layout, and step-by-step construction.
best_for: DIY builders interested in affordable alternative housing and container-home projects

name: DIY Home Energy
summary: A video-and-guide course on building a compact home solar setup and cutting electricity costs, aimed at DIY-minded homeowners.
best_for: homeowners and off-grid enthusiasts who want hands-on solar and energy-independence projects

name: DIY Dish System
summary: A DIY green-energy guide built around repurposing satellite dish components into a home power setup — popular in the prepper and energy-savings niche.
best_for: DIY and preparedness audiences interested in unconventional home energy projects
